---
title: "bmb `drop()` debug"
author: "Haoyu Ji"
format: 
  html:
    code-tools: true
    df-print: paged
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: false
    code-summary: "Code"
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false   
date: today
---

```{r pkgs}
if (!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("here")
library(Matrix)
library(ape)
library(tidyverse); theme_set(theme_bw())
library(expm)
library(RTMB)
library(colorspace)
```

```{r seed}
set.seed(427)
```

```{r funs}
## corHMM version
## https://github.com/bbolker/corHMM/blob/bolker_clean/misc/test_RTMB.R
## remotes::install_github("bbolker/corHMM", ref = "bolker_clean")
source(here::here("R", "postAD.R"))
source(here::here("R", "general.R"))
source(here::here("R", "realtree.R"))
```

```{r realdat}
#| code-summary: "import data"
fish_traits <- read.csv(here::here('data', "binaryTraitData.csv"))
fish_tree   <- readRDS(here::here('data', "treeSingle.rds"))
```

```{r clean3traits}
#| code-summary: "data cleaning"
ctraits <- fish_traits[fish_traits$species %in% fish_tree$tip.label, ]

ctraits <- ctraits[match(fish_tree$tip.label, ctraits$species), ]

c_traits <- data.frame(
  Species = ctraits$species,
  ag = ctraits$ag,
  care = ctraits$care,
  spawning = ctraits$spawning
)

c_traits <- c_traits[!is.na(c_traits$care) & !is.na(c_traits$spawning), ]
c_tree <- drop.tip(fish_tree, setdiff(fish_tree$tip.label, c_traits$Species))

c_traits <- c_traits[match(c_tree$tip.label, c_traits$Species), ]
```

```{r}
postfitfun <- function(dat, trait, state, pars, mode = c("rates", "formula"), formula_list = NULL, ...) {
  mode <- match.arg(mode)
  trait_only <- dat$data[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  tt <- system.time(invisible(capture.output(suppressWarnings(x <- with(dat, postAD(tree = tree, traitMatrix = trait_only, trait = trait, state = state, pars = pars, mode = mode, formula_list = formula_list, multistart = 1,...))))))
  attr(x, "time") <- tt
  x
}

sum_postAD <- function(ntrait = 3, ntaxa = 200, state = 2, seed = NULL,
                       traitMatrix = NULL, realtree = NULL,
                       formula_list = list(ag ~ pc * sc, pc ~ 1, sc ~ 1),
                       pars_rates = NULL, pars_formula = NULL, ...) {
  if (!is.null(seed)) set.seed(seed)
  seed <- seed %||% NA

  ss <- realfun(raw_traitM = traitMatrix, raw_tree = realtree) 

  qprep_rates <- Q_prep(mode = "rates", nstate = state, ntrait = ntrait)
  if (is.null(pars_rates)) pars_rates <- setNames(rep(log(0.2), qprep_rates$n_par), qprep_rates$par_names)
  
  qprep_formula <- Q_prep(mode = "formula", formula_list = formula_list, nstate = state)
  if (is.null(pars_formula)) pars_formula <- setNames(rep(0, qprep_formula$n_par), qprep_formula$par_names)
  

  fit_rates <- postfitfun(ss, trait = ntrait, state = state, pars = pars_rates, mode = "rates", ...)
  fit_formula <- postfitfun(ss, trait = ntrait, state = state, pars = pars_formula, mode = "formula", formula_list = formula_list, ...)

  data.frame(
    seed, ntrait, ntaxa,
    rates_opt.time = fit_rates$time_total,
    formula_opt.time = fit_formula$time_total,
    rates_obj = fit_rates$obj.best,
    formula_obj = fit_formula$obj.best,
    rates_grad_norm = sqrt(sum(fit_rates$gr.best^2)),
    formula_grad_norm = sqrt(sum(fit_formula$gr.best^2))
  )
}
```

```{r, eval = FALSE}
sum1 <- sum_postAD(ntrait = 3, ntaxa = 200, state = 2, seed = 22,
                       traitMatrix = c_traits, realtree = c_tree,
                       formula_list = list(ag ~ pc * sc, pc ~ 1, sc ~ 1))
```

```{r getdat, eval = FALSE}
#| code-summary: "resampling and running"
ntaxvec <- as.numeric(45:234)

dd <- expand.grid(seed = 101:104, ntaxa  = ntaxvec, ntrait = 3, model = "ARD", rate.cat = 1) |>
  transform(model = as.character(model))

res <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(dd))) {
  cat(sprintf("\rRunning %d/%d", i, nrow(dd)))
  flush.console()

  ntaxa_i <- dd$ntaxa[i]
  sub <- sample_subtree(tree = c_tree, traits = c_traits, ntaxa  = ntaxa_i)

  args_i <- c(
    as.list(dd[i, ]),   
    list(
      traitMatrix = sub$traits, 
      realtree = sub$tree 
    )
  )

  res[[i]] <- do.call(sumfun, args_i)
}

res_df <- do.call(rbind, res)
saveRDS(res_df, file = here::here("data", "trait3_subtree.rds"))
```
